subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the Lord of all worlds, and beareth unto them that have believed glad tidings of that which none before hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله رب العالمین و یبشر الذین آمنوا بما لا فاز به احد من قبل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
